title: AgentRunResult
description: Terminal result of `itmux run`, emitted once after the run finishes (success, failure, timeout, or cancellation).

observability.description: Plan 3 placeholder: aggregated observability data for the run.

output_artifacts.description: Paths to output artifacts collected from the workspace.

AgentRunOutcome.description: The success/failure verdict for a run (also carried by the terminal `session_end` event - see `AgentRunEventPayload::SessionEnd`).

ObservabilityBundle.description: Plan 3 placeholder: aggregated observability data attached to the final `AgentRunResult`. Minimal until Plan 3 defines the real bundle shape.
